shared_attributes.purpose: provide spatial context and visual feedback
shared_attributes.rendering: background layers, no collision with player
shared_attributes.scrolling: parallax or synchronized with game speed

context.role: Defines ground level and provides scrolling visual feedback
context.screen_position: y=0 (ground level), spans entire screen width with tiling
context.usage_scenario: Always visible, scrolls left at Current_Speed (300-900 px/s) to create movement illusion

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal line with optional small rocks/grass texture below

animation.description: Tiles seamlessly, x-position decreases by Current_Speed, loops when x < -1200px by adding 1200px

visual_specification.details: 2px horizontal line at y=0, optional small rocks or grass pixels below line (10px height max), minimal pattern to avoid distraction

relationships.shared_with: Provides y=0 reference for all ground-based objects
relationships.differences_from: background_sky is static color, ground scrolls at 100% game speed vs background clouds at 50%

explicit_negations: No decorative details that distract from gameplay
